creator: iron.udjin@gmail.com
text:
Hello,

If I set option MPG123, it fails to build package:

===>   Installing 32-bit ldconfig configuration file
===>  Building package for i386-wine-devel-2.20,1
pkg-static: Unable to access file /usr/ports/emulators/i386-wine-devel/work/stage/usr/local/lib32/wine/fakedlls/winemp3.acm:No such file or directory
pkg-static: Unable to access file /usr/ports/emulators/i386-wine-devel/work/stage/usr/local/lib32/wine/winemp3.acm.so:No such file or directory
*** Error code 1

Without MPG123 option set package builds fine.
